name: Nevada Union Theatrical Society

name: Nevada County Media
self_description: Nevada County Media is a place to create, collaborate, and learn. NCM is a media hub and production facility available for our community to utilize. It is a place to take workshops, engage in a current project, use equipment to create for yourself, and or work with our team to help you create something amazing.

name: Moonshine Ink
self_description: Moonshine Ink is North Lake Tahoe/Truckee's independent newspaper, on streets since 2002. We produce a monthly print publication with 24,000 readers along with thousands more a month on this website, which is home to digital editions of every print issue and exclusive online reporting and multimedia content.

name: Carrington's Fine Wines
self_description: Carrington's Fine Wines is a specialty wine retailer located in the quaint mining town of Nevada City, in the California Sierra Foothills. Offering an unparalleled combination of personalized, expert service with a hand-picked selection of exquisite wines.

name: Eric Rood Administration Center Lobby
self_description: Art in Public Spaces is a program of Nevada County Arts & Culture in partnership with the County of Nevada. Public art must always strive to be physically and freely accessible. It can be for simple enjoyment or carry many meanings. It can be set in stone, span a wall, be ephemeral or permanent.

name: The Vault @ Crush

name: La Galleria
self_description: La Galleria has been a staple in the local community for over 38 years. We provide treasures from around the world featuring one of a kind gifts for any occasion, any age group, of all prices. In store and soon online you can find jewelry, fashionable clothing and home décor of all kinds.

name: Holbrooke Hotel
self_description: We've been building character since 1852. Welcome to the Holbrooke Hotel: where modern luxuries blend seamlessly with a historically unique, rustic-yet-refined, one-of-a-kind property. Set in the heart of our bustling town with easy access to restaurants, tasting rooms, shops and historical sights.

name: National Exchange Hotel
self_description: Built in 1856 in what was to become the most sophisticated of the gold rush mining camps, the National Exchange Hotel is a treasured piece of Nevada City history. This grand old dame is full of rich colors and patterns, opulent furnishings and lovingly restored original features.

name: Sierra Rose Alpacas
self_description: An Environmentally Friendly Way to Enrich Your Family's Lifestyle

name: TIP Printing & Graphics
self_description: We are experienced in digital color imaging, multi color offset printing, letterpress & mailing services. Our goal is to achieve your vision because your success is also our success. 45+ Years of Printing & Graphic Experience.

name: Mountain Forge Inc.
self_description: We are a family owned and operated blacksmith shop in Lake Tahoe. We handcraft custom metal work. Hans Standteiner opened a small blacksmith shop on the banks of the Truckee River in the late 1960's. His sons, Anton and Hansi, have since taken over the business.

name: Stardust Station
self_description: Stardust Station is an art collective, including onsite artist studios and performance venue.
